name: redstart
description: Local LLM host and launcher — wraps llama.cpp/TurboQuant into a managed server with multi-device network access, chat UI, and coding agent support.
author: Patrick Carswell

scripts.dev: concurrently "vite" "npm --prefix src/chat-ui run dev:redstart" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:chat && node scripts/make-icon.mjs && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.test:security: node scripts/test-path-scope.mjs && node scripts/test-auth.mjs && node scripts/test-mcp-capabilities.mjs && npm --prefix src/chat-ui run test:security
